automations.name: Virtual call processor
automations.description: Transcript in — ClickUp updated, send-over assets generated, follow-up email drafted.

automations.name: Competitor analyst
automations.description: Researches competitors in AI follow-up and voice AI and produces strategic positioning reports.

automations.name: Outreach cadence runner
automations.description: Drafts daily follow-up emails, advances cadences, scans replies, logs phone calls.

automations.name: Outreach lead scraper
automations.description: Scrapes leads from Google Maps + Apollo, dedups against the Outreach sheet, appends to Scraped tab.

automations.name: Overview deck generator
automations.description: Generates a branded HTML + PDF overview deck after a discovery call.

automations.name: Proposal generator
automations.description: Builds branded Minimise proposals with ROI calculations from intake data or call notes.

automations.name: Client performance reporter
automations.description: Generates client performance reports from Supabase analytics data.

automations.name: Daily ClickUp queue
automations.description: Pulls today's tasks across the workspace, drafts comms-shaped subtasks, flags stale pipeline parents.

automations.name: Single-email drafter
automations.description: Drafts a single Gmail in the sender's voice with the correct Minimise footer.

automations.name: Excalidraw diagrammer
automations.description: Generates editable Excalidraw diagrams from a description.

automations.name: Multi-step build planner
automations.description: Plans non-trivial builds (skills, automations, restructures) and dispatches parallel execution.

automations.name: Skill builder
automations.description: Guides creation, optimisation, and audit of Claude Code skills.

automations.name: Dashboard sync
automations.description: Regenerates dashboard.json + tasks.json and pushes them to the public AIOS dashboard repo.

automations.name: n8n workflow assistant
automations.description: Builds, debugs, and reviews n8n workflows against Minimise best practices.

automations.name: Voice AI intel monitor
automations.description: Monitors voice AI technology, platforms, and industry developments on demand.

automations.name: Content research engine
automations.description: Researches trending AI topics, tools, and developments for YouTube content planning.

automations.name: LinkedIn post generator
automations.description: Repurposes YouTube and short-form content into LinkedIn posts.

automations.name: Service agreement generator
automations.description: Fills the Minimise service agreement template into a client-ready Google Doc.
